sent_simp: 她画了一幅人像送给朋友。
sent_trad: 她畫了一幅人像送給朋友。
pinyin: Tā huà le yī fú rénxiàng sòng gěi péngyǒu.
english: She painted a portrait and gave it to her friend.

sent_simp: 所有员工都享有带薪年假。
sent_trad: 所有員工都享有帶薪年假。
pinyin: Suǒyǒu yuángōng dōu xiǎngyǒu dàixīn niánjià.
english: All employees enjoy paid annual leave.
